catalyst.event: Q2 2026 earnings release — first full quarter test of whether BRUKINSA (zanubrutinib) ex-US growth + sonrotoclax (BCL-2) Phase 3 CELESTIAL-TN readout timeline can offset accelerating US BTK market saturation and Pfizer/AbbVie pricing pressure
catalyst.date_or_window: 2026-08-06 (±5 days, Q2 2026 earnings; CELESTIAL-TN Phase 3 interim 4Q2026)
catalyst.source: BeOne Medicines IR calendar; ClinicalTrials.gov NCT04830137 (CELESTIAL-TN); company 10-Q/20-F

rightIf_conditions: Q2 26 BRUKINSA US sequential growth <+7% QoQ (vs +10% in Q4 25) — confirming class saturation
Non-GAAP operating margin <6% in Q2 26 OR Q3 26 — failing operating leverage narrative
CELESTIAL-TN interim shows hazard ratio >0.70 vs venetoclax-obinutuzumab — sonrotoclax differentiation insufficient
wrongIf_conditions: Q2 26 BRUKINSA total revenue ≥$1.05B AND US QoQ ≥+8% — saturation thesis invalidated
Non-GAAP operating margin reaches ≥8% in Q2 26 with sustained trajectory toward 12% by Q4 26
CELESTIAL-TN interim shows HR ≤0.60 with clean safety — pipeline optionality confirmed, multi-asset franchise validated
what_changes_our_mind: Q2 2026 BRUKINSA total revenue ≥$1.05B (>+30% YoY) AND US sequential growth ≥+8% QoQ AND non-GAAP operating margin ≥8% — this combo would prove BTK saturation thesis wrong and validate consensus operating leverage view.
variant_view_one_sentence: Market prices BeOne as a multi-asset growth platform at 6x EV/S → We believe US BTK saturation + Phase 3 binary risk create negative skew not in 97-analyst PT average → Mechanism is Q2/Q3 26 sequential deceleration triggering consensus EPS cuts before CELESTIAL-TN can rescue narrative.
time_to_resolution: 5-8 months (Q2 26 print Aug 2026 → CELESTIAL-TN interim Q4 2026)

expected_pnl_asymmetry.upside_if_right: -30% to -38% (multiple compression to 4x EV/S + EPS cuts 15-25%)

quantification.metric_target: Q2 2026 BRUKINSA revenue + non-GAAP operating margin + US sequential growth
quantification.current_value: BRUKINSA Q4 25 ~$880M (est); non-GAAP op margin ~6%; US QoQ ~+10%
quantification.predicted_value: BRUKINSA Q2 26 $920-980M; non-GAAP op margin 4-6%; US QoQ +5-7%
